import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:4000";export const api={// Health check
health:()=>axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/health`),// Video endpoints
getVideos:()=>axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/videos`),deleteVideo:id=>axios.delete(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/videos/${id}`),// Browse events from Chrome extension
getEvents:(type,limit)=>axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/events`,{params:{type,limit:limit||500}}),// ML training data: sessions with impressions, clicks, watch times
getTrainingData:limit=>axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/training-data`,{params:{limit:limit||500}}),// ML model endpoints
trainModel:(epochs,batchSize)=>axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/ml/train`,{epochs:epochs||10,batch_size:batchSize||32}),getTrainStatus:()=>axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/ml/train/status`),getRecommendations:topK=>axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/ml/recommend`,{top_k:topK||20}),getMLHealth:()=>axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/ml/health`)};
